skills.name: find-skills
skills.description: Helps users discover and install agent skills when they ask questions like "how do I do X", "find a skill for X", "is there a skill that can...", or express interest in extending capabilities. This skill should be used when the user is looking for functionality that might exist as an installable skill.

skills.name: repo-skill-authoring
skills.description: Use when creating, updating, reviewing, or reorganizing skills in this repository. Applies this repo's layout, metadata rules, portability guidelines, and publication checklist.

skills.name: skills-manager
skills.description: Use when installing, listing, checking, or syncing skills from the private GitHub repository into Codex or Claude. Also use when maintaining the private skills catalog, updating source locks, or managing first-party versus mirrored skills.
